name: Medama Analytics
description: Privacy-first website analytics. Tiny, simple, and cookie-free. (Demo, Source Code)

name: Piler
description: Feature-rich email archiving solution. (Source Code)

name: 2FAuth
description: Manage your Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) accounts and generate their security codes. (Demo)

name: Beehive
description: Flexible event and agent system, which allows you to create your own agents that perform automated tasks triggered by events and filters.

name: WriteFreely
description: Writing software for starting a minimalist, federated blog — or an entire community. (Source Code)

name: Nunux Keeper
description: Your personal content curation service. (Source Code)

name: Manage My Damn Life
description: Manage my Damn Life (MMDL) is a self-hosted front end for managing your CalDAV tasks and calendars. (Source Code)

name: Directus
description: Directus is a powerful and intuitive headless CMS for managing SQL databases with custom architectures. Built around a robust and extensible API, this decoupled content management framework is perfect for websites, apps, or multi-client projects. (Source Code)

name: PixelFed
description: Ethical photo sharing platform, powered by ActivityPub federation (alternative to Instagram). (Source Code)

name: Django-CRM
description: Analytical CRM with tasks management, email marketing and many more. Django CRM is built for individual use, businesses of any size or freelancers and is designed to provide easy customization and quick development. (Source Code)

name: Baserow
description: Create your own database without technical experience (alternative to Airtable). (Source Code)

name: AdGuard Home
description: User-friendly ads & trackers blocking DNS server. (Source Code)

name: Mango
description: Manga server and web reader with a built-in MangaDex downloader.

name: Thelia
description: Thelia is an open source and flexible e-commerce solution. (Demo, Source Code)

name: FeedHQ
description: FeedHQ is a web-based feed reader. (Source Code)

name: TagSpaces
description: TagSpaces is an offline, cross-platform file manager and organiser that also can function as a note taking app. The WebDAV version of the application can be installed on top of a WebDAV servers such as Nextcloud or ownCloud. (Demo, Source Code)

name: ExMoney
description: Self-hosted personal finance app.

name: RomM
description: - ROM manager for organizing, enriching, and playing retro games, with support for 400+ platforms. (Demo, Source Code)

name: Digistorm
description: Create collaborative surveys, quizzes, brainstorms, and word clouds (documentation in French). (Demo, Source Code)

name: Homebridge
description: HomeKit support for the impatient
